nasb.text: When the bow is in the cloud, then I will look upon it, to remember the everlasting covenant between God and every living creature of all flesh that is on the earth.”

esv.text: When the bow is in the clouds, I will see it and remember the everlasting covenant between God and every living creature of all flesh that is on the earth.”

cnv.text: 彩虹在雲彩中出現， 我看見了就記念 我與地上一切有生命的活物，所立的永約。”

ccb.text: 当我看见彩虹在云中出现的时候，就会记得我与地上一切生灵立的永约。”

csbs.text: 当彩虹出现在云中，我就会看到，就会记念我与地上一切有血肉的活物所立的永远之约。”
